# Daemon Lifecycle Adapter Scope

<!-- Generated by go run ./tools/providerintegrationgatedocs -write-doc. Do not edit by hand. -->

[Back to integration gates](../integration-gates.md)

`cmd/riido daemon ...` composes provider adapters, runtime actors, supervisor, and control-plane adapters into one local process.

- The local daemon exposes status, health, ready, and metrics JSON on the local IPC endpoint.
- It owns lifecycle wiring, runtime actor startup, and local socket readiness.
- Provider CLI bundling, server HTTP/SSE, Terraform/AWS/deploy evidence, and private machine state remain outside this context.
